calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Anne Acuna, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Lloyd Frisbie and Elie Joseph, who were not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Thomas Dee Engineering Co., Inc.
Default entered against defendant on December 20, 2007.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on April 25, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, May 29, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs Lloyd Frisbie and Elie Joseph, and against the Defaulted Defendant: Thomas Dee Engineering Co., Inc. as follows:

Accrued Interest as to plaintiff Lloyd Frisbie - $234.83.
Accrued Interest as to plaintiff Elie Joseph - $114.18.
Costs $320.00, for a total of $669.01.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
